source_pr.title: plan/executor: handle optimizer hint properly for cartesian join
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/9032

### What is changed and how it works?

- allow merge join executor to handle cartesian product;
- raise warning and choose other join implementations if TIDB_INLJ is specified;

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

N/A

Side effects

N/A

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1, t2) */ * from t t1 join t t2 order by t1.a, t2.a").Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/merge_join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_SMJ(t1, t2) */ * from t t1 join t t2 order by t1.a, t2.a").Check(testkit.Rows( (executor/merge_join_test.go)

fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
